languages.text: "Будь благословенны все вероятности, что сошлись под взором Бога-Машины. Пакт "ТР-3" считаю заключенным!"
"Blessed be all the probabilities that have converged under the gaze of the Machine God. I deem Pact TR-3 concluded!"
languages.original_text: "Будь благословенны все вероятности, что сошлись под взором Бога-Машины. Пакт "ТР-3" считаю заключенным!"

traits.locale_text: "Blessed be all the probabilities that have converged under the gaze of the Machine God. I deem Pact TR-3 concluded!"
"Blessed be all the probabilities that have converged under the gaze of the Machine God. I deem Pact TR-3 concluded!"
"Blessed be all the probabilities that have converged under the gaze of the Machine God. I deem Pact TR-3 concluded!"

languages.text: 「機械神が注視する下で集まった全ての確率に祝福あれ。契約TR-3は成立と判断する！」
languages.original_text: "Blessed be all the probabilities that have converged under the gaze of the Machine God. I deem Pact TR-3 concluded!"

traits.locale_text: 機械神が注視する下で集まった全ての確率に祝福あれ。契約TR-3は成立と判断する！

languages.text: «Benditas sean las probabilidades que han coincidido bajo la mirada del Dios Máquina. ¡El pacto CI-3 queda sellado!».
languages.original_text: "Blessed be all the probabilities that have converged under the gaze of the Machine God. I deem Pact TR-3 concluded!"

traits.locale_text: «Benditas sean las probabilidades que han coincidido bajo la mirada del Dios Máquina. ¡El pacto CI-3 queda sellado!».

languages.text: "Gesegnet seien all die unter dem Auge des Maschinengottes konvergierten Wahrscheinlichkeiten. Ich betrachte Pakt TR-3 als abgeschlossen!"
languages.original_text: "Blessed be all the probabilities that have converged under the gaze of the Machine God. I deem Pact TR-3 concluded!"

traits.locale_text: "Gesegnet seien all die unter dem Auge des Maschinengottes konvergierten Wahrscheinlichkeiten. Ich betrachte Pakt TR-3 als abgeschlossen!"

languages.text: « Louées soient les probabilités qui ont convergé sous le regard du Dieu-Machine. Je déclare le pacte TR-3 conclu ! »
languages.original_text: "Blessed be all the probabilities that have converged under the gaze of the Machine God. I deem Pact TR-3 concluded!"

traits.locale_text: « Louées soient les probabilités qui ont convergé sous le regard du Dieu-Machine. Je déclare le pacte TR-3 conclu ! »

languages.text: “在万机之神的注视下，所有概率的交汇皆得赐福。我宣布，TR-3协议缔结完成！”
languages.original_text: "Blessed be all the probabilities that have converged under the gaze of the Machine God. I deem Pact TR-3 concluded!"

traits.locale_text: “在万机之神的注视下，所有概率的交汇皆得赐福。我宣布，TR-3协议缔结完成！”

languages.text: "Makine Tanrı'nın bakışları altında birleşen tüm olasılıklar kutsansın. TR-3 Paktı'nı akdedilmiş sayıyorum!"
languages.original_text: "Blessed be all the probabilities that have converged under the gaze of the Machine God. I deem Pact TR-3 concluded!"

traits.locale_text: "Makine Tanrı'nın bakışları altında birleşen tüm olasılıklar kutsansın. TR-3 Paktı'nı akdedilmiş sayıyorum!"
